messages.content: You are a Canon technical support specialist.
How can I go back to the previous screen?
Press the key.

chunk_text:
Press to return to the previous screen. If you press this key when specifying settings, for example, the
settings are not applied and the display returns to the previous screen.

messages.content: You are a Canon printer hardware expert.
How should you store the paper to protect it from moisture or dryness?
Keep the paper wrapped in its original package.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-009

You can load the paper into the paper drawer or multi-purpose tray. Load the paper you usually use into the paper
drawer. The paper drawer is convenient when using large amounts of paper. Use the multi-purpose tray when you
Available Paper(P. 194) for temporarily use size or type of paper that is not loaded in the paper drawer. See
available paper sizes.

![Loading Paper](images/image_p24_00.png)

Paper Type and Setting for the Machine
See the table below to specify the paper settings according to the type and weight of the paper to load into the
paper source. Specifying For more information about how to specify the paper settings on the machine, see
Paper Size and Type(P. 34) . For the amount of paper that can be loaded in each paper source, see
Available Paper(P. 194) .

![Paper Type and Setting for the Machine](images/image_p24_01.png)


![Paper Type and Setting for the Machine](images/image_p24_02.png)


![Paper Type and Setting for the Machine](images/image_p25_00.png)

● Highly textured paper

● Glossy paper

**Paper handling and storage**

● Store the paper on a flat surface.

● Keep the paper wrapped in its original package to protect the paper from moisture or dryness.

● Do not store the paper in such a way that may cause it to curl or fold.

● Do not store the paper vertically or stack too much paper.

● Do not store the paper in direct sunlight, or in a place subject to high humidity, dryness, or drastic
changes in temperature or humidity.

![● Do not store the paper in](images/image_p25_01.png)

**Registering a Custom Paper Size(P. 36)**

messages.content: You are a helpful Canon printer technician.
How do I select a profile in the printer settings?
Simply select the profile that suits your objective, and click [OK].

chunk_text:
Simply select the profile that suits your objective, and click [OK].

![Profile Selecting a](images/image_p79_01.png)

![Simply select the profile that suits your](images/image_p79_02.png)

**Basic Printing Operations(P. 66)
Changing Default Settings(P. 76)**


3EEJ-01L

The default settings are the settings that are first displayed whenever you open the print settings screen of the printer
driver. You can change these settings to the settings that you use most often. For example, if you always want to print
2 document pages on each printout page, set [2 on 1] as the default page layout setting. From the next time that you
open the printer driver screen, the setting will always be [2 on 1], eliminating the need to change this setting every
time you make prints.

![The default settings are the settings that](images/image_p80_00.png)

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Canon printers.
What should you do if a screen for entering a PIN is displayed when disabling the USB port?
If a screen for entering a PIN is displayed, enter the PIN, and tap <Apply>.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-024

You can disable the USB port located on the right side of the machine. If this port is disabled, the machine cannot
communicate with a computer via USB.

**● If a screen for entering a PIN is displayed, enter the PIN, and tap <Apply>. Setting the System Manager
PIN(P. 91)**

messages.content: You are a Canon technical support specialist.
How do you access the various settings of this machine?
Tap <Menu> in the <Home> screen.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-025

There are various settings in this machine. You can adjust each of the settings in detail. Access these settings by
tapping <Menu> in the <Home> screen.

**You can print the setting menu in list form to check the current settings:
User Data List/System Manager Data List(P. 171)**

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Canon printers.
How do you start troubleshooting when a paper jam occurs?
Press <Next> to display simple solutions.

chunk_text:

If a paper jams, <Paper jammed.> is displayed on the screen. Press <Next> to display simple solutions. If it is difficult to
understand the procedures on the display, see the following sections to clear jams.

![Clearing Jams](images/image_p125_00.png)

**Paper Jams in the Paper Drawer 1(P. 121)
Paper Jams around the Output Area(P. 124)
Paper Jams around the Fixing Assembly(P. 126)

messages.content: You are a Canon printer hardware expert.
What should you do if a printing job is queued when trying to scan an original?
Wait until the job is completed.

chunk_text:
**An original could not be scanned due to insufficient memory space.**

● If a printing job is queued, wait until the job is completed.

**● If scanning, change the file format to reduce its file size.
Scanning from the Machine(P. 80)**

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Canon printers.
How long should you wait after changing settings via the control panel before turning off the machine?
You should wait for approximately five seconds.

provenance.chunk: The Settings That You Specified Are Not Enabled or Saved. (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
● If you turn OFF the machine immediately after changing settings via the control panel, the settings may
not be stored in the machine. After changing the settings, wait for approximately five seconds before
turning OFF the machine.

3EEJ-037

When the drum unit inside the machine becomes dirty, print quality may deteriorate. If this happens, follow the
procedure below to clean the drum unit. Note that you cannot clean the drum unit when the machine has documents
waiting to be printed.

messages.content: You are a Canon technical support specialist.
What happens if you keep printing when the toner cartridge is nearly empty?
The print quality becomes poor.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-039

The machine will display a message when a toner cartridge is nearly empty. Note that the print quality becomes poor if
you continue printing without taking any action. You can check the remaining toner level on the display.

**When a Message Appear(P. 159)
If Printouts Are Poor in Quality(P. 159)
Checking Toner Level(P. 160)**

3EEJ-03E

When the drum unit needs to be replaced, a message appears on the display. Follow the procedure below to replace
the drum unit.

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Canon printers.
How do you check the total number of pages used for printouts?
Select the item you want to check.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-03K

You can check total for the number of pages used for printouts. This total includes reports and lists, in addition to
copies and printouts of data from computers.

![Viewing the Counter Value](images/image_p177_00.png)

Select the item you want to check.

![Select the item you want](images/image_p177_01.png)

![Select the item you want](images/image_p177_02.png)


![Select the item you want](images/image_p177_03.png)


*1 The counted number per one printed/scanned sheet for each item on the counter is as follows:

"number in the Size (Large or Small) column" × "number in the Number of Printed/Scanned Sides (One-Sided or Two-Sided)
column"

Example: For large, single-sided print, the number added to <102: Total 2> is 2 × 1 = 2.

*2 Large: Standard size larger than A3/11" x 17".

*3 Small: Standard size smaller than B4/LGL.

messages.content: You are a Canon technical support specialist.
What should I do to put the machine in sleep mode?
Press it again to instantly wake the machine back into you want. Press action.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-041

![Going Green and Saving Money](images/image_p188_00.png)

![3EEJ-041](images/image_p188_01.png)

**Print Multiple Pages on a Single Sheet**

To really start saving paper, shrink multiple pages onto a single sheet - 2 or 4 pages for copies, and up to 16
pages for print jobs sent from your computer.

![To really start saving paper, shrink multiple](images/image_p188_02.png)

To copy multiple pages of a document onto one sheet: Copying Multiple Documents onto One Sheet (2 on
1)(P. 53) 1/4 on
To print multiple pages of a document onto one sheet: Printing from a Computer(P. 66)

![To copy multiple pages of a document](images/image_p188_03.png)

**Sleep Mode**

For saving energy and money, a sleep mode that powers down a machine when nobody is using it has become
an essential feature. This machine will enter sleep mode automatically, and can also be put to sleep whenever
once to put the machine to sleep. Press it again to instantly wake the machine back into you want. Press
action.

![For saving energy and money, a sleep](images/image_p188_04.png)

**For more information about this function, see Entering Sleep Mode(P. 39) .**

![For more information about this function, see](images/image_p188_05.png)

**Save Toner**

Got multi-page documents or drafts that don't need presentation-quality printing?


There's a setting that uses less toner. Give it a try and save toner and money.

![There's a setting that uses less toner.](images/image_p189_00.png)

**For more information about this function, see Printing from a Computer(P. 66) .**

messages.content: You are a Canon printer hardware expert.
What does the simple click-operation allow you to do?
The simple click-operation allows you to conveniently make settings while viewing how settings are applied.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-042

![Improving Efficiency](images/image_p190_00.png)

![3EEJ-042](images/image_p190_01.png)

**Make Print Settings Quickly with Intuitive Operation**

You can easily specify the page layout as well as binding position, etc. intuitively on the preview image in the
printer driver. The simple click-operation allows you to conveniently make settings while viewing how settings
are applied.

![You can easily specify the page layout](images/image_p190_02.png)

**For more information, see Printing from a Computer(P. 66) .**

messages.content: You are a Canon technical support specialist.
What is a searchable PDF and how does it work?
A searchable PDF allows you to search for text information within a PDF. It is created by scanning an original with both text and images, where the text portions are converted by OCR into text data.

chunk_text: 3EEJ-043. ![Going Digital](images/image_p191_00.png). ![3EEJ-043](images/image_p191_01.png). **Scan Only What You Need**. What if you're scanning a whole page of a newspaper but all you're really interested in is a headline and a. photo? Use ScanGear MF. You can select what you want from a preview, and then have the scanner disregard. the rest. Otherwise you'll have to use an editing program to crop out everything you don't need.. ![What if you're scanning a whole page](images/image_p191_02.png). ![What if you're scanning a whole page](images/image_p191_03.png). **(P. 86) . For more information about this function, see Configuring Scan Settings in ScanGear MF**. ![(P. 86) . For more information about](images/image_p191_04.png). **Searchable PDFs**. * Searching of text in a PDF can be done with a "searchable PDF ". By scanning an original with both te xt and. images, text portions are converted by OCR into text data. In addition to being able to search for text. information, you can also copy required portions into an Excel spreadsheet or Word document in Microsoft. Office. Eliminate the need to type in customer data, addresses, etc. from scratch.. * You cannot create a searchable PDF in the macOS environment.. ![* You cannot create a searchable PDF](images/image_p192_00.png). **For more information about this function, see Scanning from a Computer(P. 83) .**. ![For more information about this function, see](images/image_p192_01.png). **Add Images to a Work in Progress**. Some applications work with the machine to let you easily import scanned images directly into documents. you're working on.

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Canon printers.
How do you protect the machine from unauthorized access?
By only allowing users with access privileges to use the machine and requiring them to enter a PIN to change settings.

chunk_text:
3EEJ-021

Protect the machine from unauthorized access by only allowing users with access privileges to use the machine. When
privileges are set, the user must enter a PIN to change settings.

![Setting Access Privileges](images/image_p94_00.png)

System Manager PIN
System Manager PIN is intended exclusively for Administrators having full access privileges. If you specify this
PIN, you need to log on to the machine using this PIN in order to access <System Management Settings>.

**Setting the System Manager PIN(P. 91)**

messages.content: You are a helpful Canon printer technician.
How do you know when to replace the toner cartridge?

Replace the nearly empty toner cartridge if your printouts begin to show any of the following features: white streaks appear, partially faded, uneven density, toner smudges and splatters appear, blank space of originals becomes grayish in printouts.

provenance.chunk: ◼ Are Poor in Quality If Printouts (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
If your printouts begin to show any of the following features, your toner cartridge is nearly empty. Replace the nearly
empty toner cartridge even if no message is displayed.

**How to Replace the Toner Cartridges(P. 163)**

White streaks appear Partially faded Uneven density

![◼ Are Poor in Quality If Printouts](images/image_p163_02.png)

Toner smudges and splatters appear Blank space of originals becomes grayish in
printouts

![Toner smudges and splatters appear Blank space](images/image_p163_03.png)

*1 onment and conditions under which the machine is being used. May vary depending on the envir



*2 Copy/print speeds are measured based on internal testing using A4 size paper copied/printed with 100% copy/print
ratio to original on one-sided paper. Internal testing involved continuously copying/printing the same one page of
content on plain paper (copy speed is tested by copying on the platen glass). Copy/print speeds may vary depending on
paper type, paper size or paper feeding direction.
The device may automatically pause or slow down in order to adjust printer condition such as controlling temperature of
a certain unit or limiting impact to image quality during continuous copying/printing.

*3 May vary depending on the installation environment and paper to use.

*4 The toner cartridge is included.

messages.content: You are a customer service agent for Canon printers.
How do I perform a keyword search in the printer manual?
Click to display the search window, enter a keyword or keywords in the text box, and click to display the search results.

chunk_text:
Click to display the search window. Contains a text box to perform a search by keyword and find the page
are looking for. you


![Search](images/image_p210_00.png)

**[Enter keyword(s) here]**

Enter a keyword or keywords and click to display the search results. You can search for pages
keywords by separating the keywords by a space (blank). Also you can only search for containing all the
pages containing an exact phrase by enclosing the keywords in double quotation marks.

**Search result**

Displays the search results of the pages that contain the specified keywords. From the results, locate the
page you are looking for and click the topic title of the page.

keyword(s) are shown in bold in the search results. ● The specified
